title: fix-first: test_claim_race scenario (c) passes sessionId to block/reopen (D4 interaction)
action: msh-6 wired test_claim_race into commands.verify and surfaced: scenario (c) claims as session sess-roundtrip but calls blockCell/reopenCell (test_claim_race.mjs:301,:306) without a sessionId, so msh-4 D4 ownership guard correctly refuses (caller null vs live claim sess-roundtrip = mismatch). Fix the TEST (the guard is right): pass the matching sessionId into both calls. Then run the FULL configured commands.verify chain from .bee/config.json and prove it green end to end (success criterion 5).

trace.outcome: test_claim_race scenario (c) fixed: blockCell and reopenCell now receive matching sessionId parameter from claim session, passing D4 ownership guard
trace.verify_output: PASS test_claim_race: (a) 8 real-path racers on one cell -> exactly 1 winner, 7 typed CLAIMED refusals naming the winner's session + expiry; (b) deliberate-red unguarded proxy showed multiple racers believing they won (detector bites); (c) claim -> block -> reopen -> claim same-session round trip succeeded with no self-refusal.
